title: Copyright Act 1994 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand statutory legislation governing copyright ownership, infringement, moral rights, and remedies. Establishes the legal framework for protecting original literary, dramatic, musical, artistic works, sound recordings, films, and communication works, with provisions for exceptions, enforcement, and dispute resolution.
